things.name: Mercedes-Benz Museum
things.description: Nine floors of automotive history in a stunning double-helix building

things.name: Porsche Museum
things.description: Sleek white museum showcasing the full history of the iconic sports car brand

things.name: Staatsgalerie Stuttgart
things.description: Outstanding art museum with James Stirling's postmodern extension and Dix masterpieces

things.name: Wilhelma Zoo & Botanical Garden
things.description: Germany's only combined zoological and botanical garden in Moorish Revival buildings

things.name: Schlossplatz
things.description: Central square with the New Palace, the Jubilee Column and surrounding green space

things.name: Stuttgart Weissenhof Estate
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage Modernist housing exhibition of 1927 by Mies van der Rohe and others

things.name: Fernsehturm Stuttgart
things.description: World's first television tower in concrete, built 1956, with observation deck

things.name: Altes Schloss
things.description: Renaissance palace in the city centre housing the Wurttembergisches Landesmuseum

things.name: Stuttgart Vineyards
things.description: Terraced vineyard hillsides within the city limits producing excellent Trollinger wine

things.name: Stuttgarter Weindorf
things.description: Famous annual wine festival with hundreds of Wurttemberg wines in the pedestrian zone
